summary: Iteration 9 testing complete - All features verified: Dark mode default (100%), soft golden light mode (#FEFCF3), event reminder background task. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: 9/9 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeGate in App.js correctly defaults to dark mode when localStorage has no rt-theme value
ThemeGate sets localStorage to 'dark' if not already set
Light mode CSS variables in index.css use warm golden colors: --bg-primary: #FEFCF3, --bg-secondary: #FFFDF7, --bg-sidebar: #FAF7EE
Light mode body background is rgb(254, 252, 243) - NOT stark white (#F5F5F7)
Theme toggle button (data-testid='theme-toggle-btn') in TitleBar.jsx works correctly
_event_reminder_loop() background task is started on app startup via asyncio.create_task()
_send_event_reminders() function checks events for today, finds events 45-75 minutes away, and sends SMS to offline members with auto_sms enabled
Event reminder uses send_auto_sms_if_offline helper which checks: user offline, auto_sms=true, phone exists, Twilio configured
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 complete. Three features verified: (1) Dark mode is now the default when localStorage has no rt-theme value - ThemeGate in App.js adds 'dark' class and sets localStorage. (2) Light mode uses soft golden colors instead of stark white - CSS variables changed to #FEFCF3 (bg-primary), #FFFDF7 (bg-secondary), #FAF7EE (bg-sidebar). (3) Event reminder background task exists and starts on app startup - _event_reminder_loop runs every 10 minutes, _send_event_reminders checks events for today starting within 45-75 minutes and sends SMS to offline table members with auto_sms enabled. Note: Event reminder won't actually fire during testing (runs every 10 min, checks events 45-75 min away), but code verified to exist and be properly structured.

dark_mode_default.behavior: When localStorage has no rt-theme value, adds 'dark' class to documentElement and sets localStorage to 'dark'

event_reminder_background_task.logic: Checks events for today, finds events starting within 45-75 minutes, sends SMS to offline table members with auto_sms enabled
event_reminder_background_task.note: Uses same send_auto_sms_if_offline helper as other SMS features

regression.sidebar_navigation: All 7 nav items work (Portal, Calendar, Messages, Walkie, Call History, Apps, Contacts)
regression.settings_page: Phone number input and auto-SMS toggle present

mocked_apis_list: Event reminders use send_auto_sms_if_offline helper - Twilio trial account cannot send to unverified numbers
mocked_apis.note: Event reminder code paths verified but actual SMS delivery not tested due to Twilio trial limitations. The _send_event_reminders function is properly structured and calls send_auto_sms_if_offline for each offline member.
